FINALISTS ANNOUNCED

The 2026 One Show Finalists are here!
Awards will be publicly released May 14. Celebrate this year's winners with us May 15 in New York City at the ceremony.

See the List
YOUR WORK, CRYSTALLIZED.

The One Show is where the world's best ideas rise to the top. For over 50 years, the Pencil has stood as one of the most respected honors in advertising, design, and beyond. And at the pinnacle: the Crystal Pencil, awarded only to Best of Discipline winners—peer-to-peer recognition from a jury of over 300 global creative leaders.

Winning here is hard. That's why it matters. The One Show represents integrity, bold thinking, and the highest level of creative excellence across the industry.

With disciplines spanning the full spectrum of creativity—from timeless formats like Print and Film to cutting-edge categories in Gaming, Creative Use of AI, and the brand-new Creator Content discipline—The One Show continues to evolve alongside the work it honors. 2026 also sees the debut of The One Show Indies, a dedicated competition for independent shops proving you don't need scale to make impact.

Winners are celebrated on May 15, 2026, during Creative Week in New York City—a week-long global festival from The One Club for Creativity, the world’s foremost nonprofit supporting and celebrating the creative community.

This is your moment. Explore the categories. Enter your boldest work. Claim your place among the world’s best.

The One Show Indies

Commitment to Integrity

Integrity has always been the foundation of The One Show. For over 50 years, we have upheld the principle that true creative excellence must also be authentic, fair, and transparent. In 2026, we renew that commitment with even stronger standards that protect the legacy of the Pencil and the trust of the global creative community.

Read more

Award Intelligence

For the first time, entrants to The One Show can gain meaningful insight into how their work performed in the jury room—through a new AI-powered feedback tool designed to educate, clarify, and elevate future submissions.

This optional service transforms the often-mysterious judging process into actionable learning, helping entrants better understand why a piece resonated with judges and how award decisions were made.

Learn more

One Show Pencils

GOLD / SILVER / BRONZE PENCILS
Icons of achievement that honor ideas distinguished by brilliance, craft, and lasting impact

CRYSTAL PENCIL
Awarded to Best of Disciplines, Best of Non-Profit, and the year's top ranked winners—including agencies, production studios, networks, and more

BEST OF SHOW PENCIL
The pinnacle honor—recognizing the single most defining idea of the year
